```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(stringr)
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
library(cowplot)
library(digest)
library(ggrepel)
library(ggarchery)
library(scales)
```

```{r}
rawdf = read.csv("bench_report_2026Mar30.csv") %>%
  mutate(
    threads = if_else(
      str_detect(Tool, "thread"), gsub(".* ([0-9]{1,2}) thread.*", "\\1", Tool), "1"),
    Tool = if_else(
      str_detect(Tool, "thread"), gsub("(.*).* [0-9]{1,2} thread.*", "\\1", Tool), Tool),
    Mode = str_replace_all(Mode, "plp", ""), 
    
    Tool = if_else(
      str_detect(Mode, "histo"), 
      paste(Tool, Mode),
      Tool,
    ),
    
    Tool = str_replace_all(Tool, "pileuphi", "pileup-hi"),
    Tool = str_replace_all(Tool, "para_mpileup", "parallel samtools mpileup"),
    
    File = case_when(
      str_detect(File, "_") ~ str_split_i(File, "_", 1),
      str_detect(File, "\\.") ~ str_split_i(File, "\\.", 1),
      .default = File
    ),
    Sample = case_when(
      str_detect(File, "ERR2756166") ~ "T. pallidum 1",
      str_detect(File, "ERR2756169") ~ "T. pallidum WGS - HiSeq 2500",
      str_detect(File, "SRR19895870") ~ "Rocoto pepper - NovaSeq 6000",
      str_detect(File, "SRR36374445") ~ "Human WGS - Ultima",
      str_detect(File, "SRR30646148") ~ "Human WGS - Onso",
      str_detect(File, "SRR30646149") ~ "Human WGS - Revio",
      str_detect(File, "SRR30646150") ~ "Human WGS - Revio 2",
      str_detect(File, "DRR793869") ~ "Human WGS - NovaSeq X Plus"
    )
    )

rawdf <- rawdf %>%
  mutate(
    Tool = factor(Tool, levels = c("samtools mpileup", "parallel samtools mpileup", "perbase base-depth", "pileup-hi", "pileup-hi histo")),
    Sample = factor(Sample, levels = c("Human WGS - NovaSeq X Plus",  "Human WGS - Ultima", "Human WGS - Revio", "Rocoto pepper - NovaSeq 6000", "T. pallidum WGS - HiSeq 2500")),
    threads = factor(threads, levels = c("1", "4", "8", "12")),
  ) %>%
  filter(!File %in% c("ERR2756166", "SRR30646148", "SRR30646150")) %>%
  filter(!(Tool == "parallel samtools mpileup" & threads == "1")) %>%
  arrange(Tool, threads)
# 
rawdf_sum <- rawdf %>%
  group_by(File, Sample, Tool, threads) %>%
  summarize(
    mean_runtime = mean(Runtime), median_runtime = median(Runtime), sd_runtime = sd(Runtime),
    mean_mem = mean(Peak.memory.used), median_mem = median(Peak.memory.used), sd_mem = sd(Peak.memory.used),
    ) %>%
  arrange(Tool, threads)
```
```{r}

metrics = read.csv("alignment_metrics_table.csv") %>%
  mutate(File = str_split_i(File, "_", 1)) %>%
  mutate(File = str_replace_all(File, ".bam", ""))
```

```{r}
FILL_SCALE = scale_fill_manual(values = c(
  "samtools mpileup" = "goldenrod3",
  # "perbase base-depth" = "plum4", 
  "perbase base-depth" = "plum4",
  # "pileup-hi plp" = "indianred4",
  "pileup-hi" = "indianred4",
  "pileup-hi histo" = "indianred2",
  "parallel samtools mpileup" = "goldenrod4"
  ))

COLOR_SCALE = scale_color_manual(values = c(
  "samtools mpileup" = "goldenrod3",
  # "perbase base-depth" = "plum4", 
  "perbase base-depth" = "plum4",
  "pileup-hi" = "indianred4",
  "pileup-hi histo" = "indianred2",
  "parallel samtools mpileup" = "goldenrod4"
  ))

AXIS_TEXT_COLOR = adjustcolor("black", alpha.f = 0.82)
```

```{r}
runtime = rawdf_sum %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = threads, y = mean_runtime, fill = Tool)) +
  facet_grid(~Sample, scales = "free", space = "free_x") + 
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(preserve = "single"), color = "black") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(x = threads, ymin = mean_runtime - sd_runtime, ymax = mean_runtime + sd_runtime), position = position_dodge(preserve = "single")) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(0, 20000)) +
  FILL_SCALE +
  theme_classic() +
  xlab("Threads") +
  ylab("Runtime (seconds)") +
  geom_text(
    label = paste0("mean depth: ", round(metrics$MeanDepth[metrics$File == rawdf_sum$File], 1)), 
    y = 19100, 
    x = 0.55, 
    check_overlap = TRUE, 
    hjust = 0, 
    size = 6 * 5/14
    ) +
  geom_text(
    label = paste0("mean coverage: ", round(metrics$Coverage[metrics$File == rawdf_sum$File], 1), "%"), 
    y = 18300, 
    x = 0.55, 
    check_overlap = TRUE, 
    hjust = 0, 
    size = 6 * 5/14
    ) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(label.position = "left")) +
  theme(
    legend.position = c(0.90,0.57),
      legend.title = element_blank(),
      legend.text = element_text(size = 8),
      # legend.key.justification = "right",
      text = element_text(size = 8),
      panel.background = element_blank(),
      plot.background = element_blank(),
      legend.key.size = unit(0.45, "cm"),
      axis.title.x = element_text(size = 10),
      axis.title.y = element_text(size = 10),
    
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8, color = AXIS_TEXT_COLOR),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8,color = AXIS_TEXT_COLOR)
    )

runtime
ggsave("runtime.pdf", runtime, width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 600)
```

```{r}
memory = rawdf_sum %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = threads, y = mean_mem, fill = Tool)) + 
  facet_grid(~Sample, scales = "free", space = "free_x") +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(preserve = "single"), color = "black") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(x = threads, ymin = mean_mem - sd_mem, ymax = mean_mem + sd_mem), position = position_dodge(preserve = "single"), color = "black") +
  scale_x_discrete(position = "top") +
  FILL_SCALE +
  scale_y_reverse(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(0, 20)) +
  theme_classic() + 
  ylab("Peak memory\nusage (GB)") + 
  xlab("Threads") +
  theme(
    strip.text = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "none",
    text = element_text(size = 8),
    panel.background = element_blank(),
    plot.background = element_blank(),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8, color = AXIS_TEXT_COLOR),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8,color = AXIS_TEXT_COLOR)
    )

memory

ggsave("memory.pdf", memory, width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 600)
```

# now plot output size comparison
```{r}
# sizedf = read.csv("size_comp_02_04_2026_11_22_29.csv") %>%
sizedf = read.csv("size_comp_2026Mar31.csv") %>%
  mutate(
    Tool = paste0("pileup-hi ", Mode),
    Mode = str_replace_all(Mode, "plp", "pileup"),
    Sample = case_when(
      str_detect(File, "ERR2756166") ~ "T. pallidum 1",
      str_detect(File, "ERR2756169") ~ "T. pallidum WGS - HiSeq 2500",
      str_detect(File, "SRR19895870") ~ "Rocoto pepper - NovaSeq 6000",
      str_detect(File, "SRR36374445") ~ "Human WGS - Ultima",
      str_detect(File, "SRR30646148") ~ "Human WGS - Onso",
      str_detect(File, "SRR30646149") ~ "Human WGS - Revio",
      str_detect(File, "SRR30646150") ~ "Human WGS - Revio 2",
      str_detect(File, "DRR793869") ~ "Human WGS - NovaSeq X Plus"
    )
    ) %>% 
  group_by(Sample) %>%
  mutate(change = max(Size) - min(Size), perc = Size / max(Size) * 100, perc_saved = change / max(Size)) %>%
  # filter(!File %in% c("ERR2756166.bam", "SRR30646148.bam", "SRR30646150_hg38.bam")) %>%
  filter(!str_detect(File, "ERR2756166|SRR30646148|SRR30646150")) %>%
  ungroup()

# depth, cov, genome length
# metrics = read.csv("aln_metrics.txt", sep = "\t") %>%
#   filter(Ref != "chrM") %>%
#   group_by(File) %>%
#   # collapse all chrs to single file
#   summarize(mean_depth = mean(MeanDepth), coverage = mean(Coverage), length = sum(Length))
# 
# sizedf = sizedf %>% left_join(metrics, by = "File", relationship = "many-to-one") %>% mutate(depthlen = mean_depth / length)
```

```{r fig.width = 8, fig.height = 2, dpi = 800}
sizedf$Mode = factor(sizedf$Mode, levels = c("pileup", "histo"))

size = sizedf %>%
  mutate(Sample = str_replace(Sample, " - ", "\n"),
         Sample = str_replace(Sample, " ", "\n")
         ) %>%
  mutate(
    Sample = factor(Sample, levels = c("Human\nWGS\nNovaSeq X Plus",  "Human\nWGS\nUltima", "Human\nWGS\nRevio", "Rocoto\npepper\nNovaSeq 6000", "T.\npallidum WGS\nHiSeq 2500")),
  ) %>%
  ggplot() +
  facet_grid(~Sample) +
  geom_line(aes(x = Mode, y = perc, group = 1), linetype = "dashed", color = "grey") +
  geom_point(aes(x = Mode, y = perc, color = Mode), size = 2.3, alpha = 0.8) + 
  scale_color_manual(values = c("pileup" = "indianred4", "histo" = "indianred2")) +
  geom_text_repel(aes(x = Mode, y = perc, label = paste0(signif(Size, 3), " GB")), min.segment.length = 1000, size = 7 * 5/14, seed = 1) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 100)) +
  theme_classic() +
  ylab("% reduction in\noutput size") + 
  xlab("") + 
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    text = element_text(size = 8),
    strip.text = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8, color = AXIS_TEXT_COLOR),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8, color = AXIS_TEXT_COLOR),
    )
  

size
ggsave("size.pdf", size, width = 8, height = 2, dpi = 1000)
```
# put it all together
```{r fig.height = 6.0, width = 8, dpi = 800}
runtime_mem = ((runtime  + theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(), axis.title.x = element_blank())) / plot_spacer() / memory / plot_spacer() / size) + plot_layout(axes = "collect", axis_titles = "collect", heights = c(0.42, -0.05, 0.36, 0.01, 0.22))
runtime_mem

ggsave("figures/figure1C_2026Apr08.pdf", runtime_mem, dpi = 1000, width = 8.2, height = 6.0)
```

# plot hashes of plp output with a correlation plot
```{r}

# hashdf = read.csv("hashes_2026Feb04.csv") %>%
hashdf = read.csv("hashes_2026Feb27.csv") %>%
  # filter(!File %in% c("ERR2756166.bam", "SRR30646150.bam", "SRR30646148.bam")) %>%
  filter(!str_detect(File, "ERR2756166|SRR30646150|SRR30646148")) %>%
  mutate(
    Sample = case_when(
      str_detect(File, "ERR2756166") ~ "T. pallidum 1",
      str_detect(File, "ERR2756169") ~ "T. pallidum WGS - HiSeq 2500",
      str_detect(File, "SRR19895870") ~ "Rocoto pepper - NovaSeq 6000",
      str_detect(File, "SRR36374445") ~ "Human WGS - Ultima",
      str_detect(File, "SRR30646148") ~ "Human WGS - Onso",
      str_detect(File, "SRR30646149") ~ "Human WGS - Revio",
      str_detect(File, "SRR30646150") ~ "Human WGS - Revio 2",
      str_detect(File, "DRR793869") ~ "Human WGS - NovaSeq X Plus"
    )
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Sample = factor(Sample, levels = c("Human WGS - NovaSeq X Plus",  "Human WGS - Ultima", "Human WGS - Revio", "Rocoto pepper - NovaSeq 6000", "T. pallidum WGS - HiSeq 2500")),
  ) %>%
  arrange(Sample) %>%
  mutate(
    Hash = str_split_i(Hash, "\\s+", 1),
    # Hash_numeric = as.integer(factor(Hash, levels = unique(Hash))),
    
    Hash_numeric = sapply(Hash, function(h) {
      as.numeric(paste0("0x", substr(digest(h, algo = "crc32"), 1, 8)))
    }),
    Threads = if_else(str_detect(Tool, "threads"), as.numeric(gsub(".* ([0-9]+) thread.*", "\\1", Tool)), 1),
    Tool = if_else(str_detect(Tool, "threads"), str_split_i(Tool, " ", 1), Tool),
  )

pileuphi_data <- hashdf %>%
  filter(Tool == "pileuphi") %>%
  select(Sample, hash_pileuphi = Hash_numeric, Threads)

samtools_data <- hashdf %>%
  filter(Tool == "samtools mpileup") %>%
  select(Sample, hash_samtools = Hash_numeric)

plot_data <- samtools_data %>%
  inner_join(pileuphi_data, by = "Sample") %>%
  mutate(
      hashes_match = (hash_samtools == hash_pileuphi),
      match_label = if_else(hashes_match, "Match", "Mismatch"),
      hash_wrapped = gsub("(.{16})", "\\1\n", hash_pileuphi)
    )
```


```{r fig.width = 3.4, fig.height = 3.4, dpi = 800}
cor_value <- cor(plot_data$hash_samtools, plot_data$hash_pileuphi, method = "pearson")

SAMPLE_COLORS = c(
  "Rocoto pepper - NovaSeq 6000" = "tan3",
  "Human WGS - Ultima" = "paleturquoise4",
  "Human WGS - Onso" = "darkseagreen4",
  "Human WGS - Revio" = "slateblue4",
  "Human WGS - Revio 2" = "slateblue1",
  "T. pallidum WGS - HiSeq 2500" = "lightpink4",
  "Human WGS - NovaSeq X Plus" = "darkseagreen4"

)

label_data <- plot_data %>%
  group_by(Sample) %>%
  summarize(
    x = mean(hash_samtools),
    y = mean(hash_pileuphi)
  )

# scientific_label <- function(x) {
#   if (str_equal(x, "1e8")) {
#     return ("0")
#   }
#   parse(text = gsub("e\\+?(-?)0*(\\d+)", "\\1%*%10^\\2", scales::scientific(x)))
# }

scientific_label <- function(x) {
  labels <- gsub("e\\+?(-?)0*(\\d+)", "\\1%*%10^\\2", scales::scientific(x))
  labels[x == 1e8] <- "0"
  parse(text = labels)
}

cor = plot_data %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = hash_samtools, y = hash_pileuphi)) +
  geom_abline(intercept = 0, slope = 1, linetype = "dashed",
              color = "black", linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_jitter(aes(color = Sample, size = factor(Threads)), alpha = 1,
                width = max(plot_data$hash_samtools) * 0,
                height = max(plot_data$hash_pileuphi) * 0,
              shape = 1
              ) +
  geom_text_repel(
    data = label_data,
    # aes(x = x / min_hash_to_normalize, y = y / min_hash_to_normalize, label = Sample, color = Sample),
    aes(x = x, y = y, label = Sample, color = Sample),
    direction = "x",
    xlim = c(1e8, 1e10),
    size = 7 * 5/14,
    segment.color = "black",
    nudge_x = case_when(
      label_data$Sample == "Human WGS - NovaSeq X Plus" ~ 1.55e9,
      label_data$Sample == "Rocoto pepper - NovaSeq 6000" ~ 1.57e9,
      label_data$Sample == "Human WGS - Revio" ~ -1.11e9,
      label_data$Sample == "Human WGS - Ultima" ~ -1.13e9,
      label_data$Sample == "T. pallidum WGS - HiSeq 2500" ~ -1.51e9,
      .default = 0,
    ),
    nudge_y = if_else(
      label_data$y < 2e9,
      # 0.2e9,
      0,
      0
    ),
    seed = 1,
    max.overlaps = 20,
    box.padding = 0.15,
    fontface = "bold",
    min.segment.length = 100) +

    # annotate("text", x = 2.2e9, y = 2.2e9 + 0.2e9, angle = 45, label = "y = x") +
    annotate("text", x = 1.3e9, y = 1.3e9 + 0.25e9, angle = 45, label = "y = x") +

    annotate("text", x = Inf, y = -Inf,
             label = paste0("Pearson r = ", signif(cor_value, 2)),
             hjust = 1, vjust = -0.5, size = 7 * 5/14,
             fontface = "bold",
             ) +

    scale_size_manual(values = c("1" = 1, "4" = 2, "8" = 4, "12" = 6), name = "Threads") +
    scale_color_manual(values = SAMPLE_COLORS) +
    guides(color = "none") +

    scale_x_continuous(labels = scientific_label, breaks = c(1e8, 1e9, 2e9, 3e9, 4e9, 5e9), limits = c(1e8, 5e9), expand = c(0, 0)) +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = scientific_label, breaks = c(1e8, 1e9, 2e9, 3e9, 4e9, 5e9), limits = c(1e8, 5e9), expand = c(0, 0)) +

    # scale_x_continuous(labels = label_scientific(), breaks = c(1e8, 1e9, 2e9, 3e9, 4e9, 5e9), limits = c(1e8, 5e9), expand = c(0, 0)) +
    # scale_y_continuous(labels = label_scientific(), breaks = c(1e8, 1e9, 2e9, 3e9, 4e9, 5e9), limits = c(1e8, 5e9), expand = c(0, 0)) +
  
    theme_classic() +
    theme(
      legend.position = c(0.12, 0.85),
      text = element_text(size = 8),
      axis.title.x = element_text(size = 10),
      axis.title.y = element_text(size = 10),
      legend.key.spacing.y = unit(1, "pt"),
      legend.key.size = unit(10, "pt"),

      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8, color = AXIS_TEXT_COLOR),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8, color = AXIS_TEXT_COLOR),
      ) +
    xlab("Output nhash (samtools mpileup)") +
    ylab("Output nhash (pileup-hi)") +
    coord_fixed(ratio = 1)

cor
ggsave("figures/cor.pdf", cor, width = 3.4, height = 3.4, dpi = 800)
```

```{r}
comp = rawdf_sum %>% 
  # mutate(Tool = str_replace_all(Tool, "parallel samtools mpileup", "samtools mpileup")) %>%
  filter(Tool != "pileup-hi histo") %>%
  group_by(File, threads) %>%
  summarize(
    runtime_diff_mpileup = mean(mean_runtime[Tool == "samtools mpileup"]) / mean(mean_runtime[Tool == "pileup-hi"]),
    memory_diff_mpileup = mean(mean_mem[Tool == "samtools mpileup"]) / mean(mean_mem[Tool == "pileup-hi"]),
    
    runtime_diff_perbase = mean(mean_runtime[Tool == "perbase base-depth"]) / mean(mean_runtime[Tool == "pileup-hi"]),
    memory_diff_perbase = mean(mean_mem[Tool == "perbase base-depth"]) / mean(mean_mem[Tool == "pileup-hi"]),
    
    runtime_diff_para = mean(mean_runtime[Tool == "parallel samtools mpileup"]) / mean(mean_runtime[Tool == "pileup-hi"]),
    memory_diff_para = mean(mean_mem[Tool == "parallel samtools mpileup"]) / mean(mean_mem[Tool == "pileup-hi"]),
    
    memory_diff_para_gb = mean(mean_mem[Tool == "parallel samtools mpileup"]) - mean(mean_mem[Tool == "pileup-hi"]),
    )

comp_single_thread = rawdf_sum %>%
  filter(Tool == "samtools mpileup" | (Tool == "pileup-hi" & threads == 12)) %>%
  group_by(File) %>%
  summarize(
    runtime_diff_mpileup_1t = mean(mean_runtime[Tool == "samtools mpileup"]) / max(mean_runtime[Tool == "pileup-hi"])
  )

mean_pileuphi_mem = mean(rawdf_sum$mean_mem[rawdf_sum$Tool == "pileup-hi"])
mean_perbase_mem = mean(rawdf_sum$mean_mem[rawdf_sum$Tool == "perbase base-depth"])

```

### !OLD!, not used in current version of paper
# Calculate some stats for the paper
```{r}
tmax_plp_sam = rawdf %>%
  group_by(File) %>%
  mutate(diff = max(Runtime[Tool == "samtools mpileup"]) / min(Runtime[Tool == "pileup-hi plp"])) %>%
  pull(diff) %>%
  max()
print(paste0("Up to ", round(tmax_plp_sam, 1), "x improvement in runtime relative to samtools mpileup"))

mmax_plp_sam = rawdf %>%
  group_by(File) %>%
  mutate(diff = max(Peak.memory.used[Tool == "samtools mpileup"]) / min(Peak.memory.used[Tool == "pileup-hi plp"])) %>%
  pull(diff) %>%
  max()
print(paste0("Up to ", round(mmax_plp_sam, 1), "x improvement in memory relative to samtools mpileup"))

tmax_plp_per = rawdf %>%
  group_by(File, threads) %>%
  mutate(diff = max(Runtime[Tool == "perbase base-depth"]) / min(Runtime[Tool == "pileup-hi plp"])) %>%
  pull(diff) %>%
  max()
print(paste0("Up to ", round(tmax_plp_per, 1), "x improvement in runtime relative to perbase base-depth"))

mmax_plp_per = rawdf %>%
  group_by(File, threads) %>%
  mutate(diff = max(Peak.memory.used[Tool == "perbase base-depth"]) / min(Peak.memory.used[Tool == "pileup-hi plp"])) %>%
  pull(diff) %>%
  max()
print(paste0("Up to ", round(mmax_plp_per, 1), "x improvement in memory relative to perbase base-depth"))

mmax_plp_per_df = rawdf %>%
  group_by(File, threads) %>%
  mutate(diff = max(Peak.memory.used[Tool == "perbase base-depth"]) / min(Peak.memory.used[Tool == "pileup-hi plp"]))

# difference in runtime between samtools mpileup and other tools when threads == 1
t1_runtime = rawdf_sum %>% 
  filter(threads == 1) %>%
  group_by(File) %>% 
  mutate(diff = mean(mean_runtime[Tool == "samtools mpileup"]) / mean(mean_runtime[Tool %in% c("pileup-hi plp", "perbase base-depth")])) %>%
  pull(diff)

t1_runtime_min = t1_runtime %>% min()
t1_runtime_max = t1_runtime %>% max()
print(paste0("With one thread, pileup-hi and perbase base-depth ran anywhere from ", round(t1_runtime_min, 1), " to ", round(t1_runtime_max, 1), "x faster than samtools mpileup"))

max_mem_hi = rawdf %>%  filter(Tool == "pileup-hi plp") %>% pull(Peak.memory.used) %>% max() 
max_mem_perbase = rawdf %>% filter(Tool == "perbase base-depth") %>% pull(Peak.memory.used) %>% max()
mean_mem_perbase = rawdf %>% filter(Tool == "perbase base-depth") %>% pull(Peak.memory.used) %>% mean()

runtime_comp_t1 = rawdf_sum %>%
  filter(Tool %in% c("pileup-hi plp", "perbase base-depth") & threads == 1) %>%
  group_by(File) %>%
  mutate(runtime_diff = (max(mean_runtime) - min(mean_runtime)) / max(mean_runtime))

minmem = rawdf_sum %>%
  filter(Tool != "pileup-hi histo") %>%
  group_by(File) %>%
  slice_min(mean_mem, n = 1)

print(sizedf %>% mutate(perc = 100 - perc) %>% select(Tool, File, perc))
```
